description: Relaxed preconditions. Hard blocks remain only when there is no meaningful fallback behavior.

rules.on_fail_message_en: Please select your skin goals first.
rules.on_fail_message_zh: 请先选择你的护肤目标。

rules.condition: thread_state.blueprint_id is non-null or thread_state.blueprint exists
rules.on_fail_message_en: Complete a diagnosis first to generate your routine blueprint.
rules.on_fail_message_zh: 请先完成肌肤诊断，再生成你的护肤蓝图。

rules.on_fail_message_en: Set up your routine framework first.
rules.on_fail_message_zh: 请先建立你的护肤流程框架。

rules.condition: context.current_routine has at least one assigned product
rules.on_fail_message_en: Add your current products before running an audit.
rules.on_fail_message_zh: 请先把当前在用产品加入流程，再进行审查。

rules.on_fail_message_en: Which ingredient would you like to learn about?
Please share a product link or product name so I can analyze it.
rules.on_fail_message_zh: 请分享产品链接或产品名，我来帮你分析。

rules.on_fail_message_en: Which product would you like to compare it with?
rules.on_fail_message_zh: 你想拿它和哪个产品对比？

rules.on_fail_message_en: Where are you traveling and when? I can adjust your routine for the trip.
rules.on_fail_message_zh: 你要去哪里旅行、什么时候出发？我可以帮你调整旅行护肤方案。
